news.t: New ProShares ETF Targets Firms Buying Back Shares
ProShares Launches the First ETF Targeting Companies with a Sustained History of Share Buybacks

holdings.infoBox: BUYB is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are QUALCOMM stock at 2.32%, Applied Materials at 2.06%, Cisco Systems at 2.02%, DaVita at 1.97%, and Jabil at 1.87%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P 500 Buyback Aristocrats ETF (BUYB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Buyback Aristocrats index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of at least 40 large-cap US companies that have consistently reduced common shares outstanding through buying back shares. BUYB was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches the First ETF Targeting Companies with a Sustained History of Share Buybacks
